subcodes.first_line: O herald of the Covenant! Your letter of the seventh of Sha'ban of the present year hath arrived and indicated, praise be to God [3.5s]... ...Explain to the people the details of the Mashrak-el-Azkar in Chicago
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منادی پیمان نامه ۷ شعبان سنه حاضره رسید و دلالت بر آن مینمود که الحمد لله
subcodes.subjects: @House of Worship [Mashriqu'l-Adhkar], @unity of governments; political unity, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @education of children; moral education, @growth of the Cause
